signals.headline: Trump Agrees to 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran After Threats of Annihilation | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Agrees to 2-Week Ceasefire with Iran After Threats of Annihilation | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Donald Trump announced a two-week ceasefire agreement with Iran on Tuesday evening, April 7-8, 2026, shifting from morning threats of "annihilation" and strikes on civilian infrastructure to accepting Tehran's "workable" plan ahead of an 8 p.m. ET deadline.[1][2]

signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY, Below Forecasts | YES | HIGH**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% per Statistics Korea data released recently; this containment amid energy volatility could shift BoK rate cut bets and prediction markets on inflation staying near 2% target.[1]
